case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A VS. HAICI MEI

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 63221600)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-04-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
